preview_text:
The model favors Algeria at 38%, with Austria as a narrow underdog at 30%. The gap reflects a modest edge for the African side, though the 8-percentage-point difference leaves Austria entirely in contention.

The 31.5% draw probability indicates a competitive match with genuine likelihood of stalemate. The win probabilities are tightly clustered—no team commands a dominant expectation—suggesting a tactical, close contest where the result could plausibly fall any of three ways.

The model and sportsbook consensus diverge meaningfully. Books and Polymarket both favor Austria at 44%, running 14 percentage points ahead of the model's projection. The model tilts toward Algeria and assigns a higher draw probability. The dashboard does not adjudicate between these sources; the divergence warrants attention from users weighing competing forecasts.
